items.title: Software horror: litellm PyPI supply chain attack.
items.title_zh: 软件恐怖：litellm PyPI 供应链攻击。
items.description: Software horror: litellm PyPI supply chain attack. Simple `pip install litellm` was enough to exfiltrate SSH keys, AWS/GCP/Azure creds, Kubernetes configs, git credentials, env vars (all your API keys), shell history, crypto wallets, SSL p…
items.description_zh: 软件恐怖：litellm PyPI 供应链攻击。简单的“pip install litellm”足以泄露 SSH 密钥、AWS/GCP/Azure 凭证、Kubernetes 配置、git 凭证、环境变量（所有 API 密钥）、shell 历史记录、加密钱包、SSL p…

items.description: seriously @walden_yan cooked, this thing legitimately saves my ass 3-8x a day, and yes it sounds weird that devin can catch devin's own mistakes, but this is basically the equivalent of "sleeping on it" and looking at a PR with fresh/more…
items.description_zh: 说真的@walden_yan熟了，这东西每天可以合法地拯救我的屁股3-8次，是的，听起来很奇怪，德文可以发现德文自己的错误，但这基本上相当于“睡在上面”，然后用新鲜/更多的东西看公关……

items.title: I hope AI agents will help us all stop obsessing about:
items.title_zh: 我希望人工智能代理能够帮助我们所有人停止沉迷于：
items.description: I hope AI agents will help us all stop obsessing about: - Specs - Designs - Issues - Roadmaps - Strategy docs - Spreadsheets and instead let us all obsess about improving the end user product and rapid iteration loops with users. Product d…
items.description_zh: 我希望人工智能代理将帮助我们所有人停止沉迷于： - 规格 - 设计 - 问题 - 路线图 - 策略文档 - 电子表格，而是让我们所有人沉迷于改进最终用户产品和与用户的快速迭代循环。产品设计

items.description: I haven’t written a PRD by hand, filed an issue through a form, or hand-written any code in months. But the volume of work I’m producing and the quality bar have never been higher. https://t.co/dSyyn7yzwg
items.description_zh: 我已经几个月没有手工编写 PRD、通过表格提交问题或手写任何代码了。但我正在制作的作品数量和质量标准从未如此高过。 https://t.co/dSyyn7yzwg
